rulings.Case Title: OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CARJO PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Carjo Properties, Llc., Joy Brorsen, And Norman Bouton'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And Production Of Documents By Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2017, line 1. Defendants Carjo Properties, LLC., Joy Brorsen, And Norman Bouton's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And Production Of Documents By Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant's Motion to compel further responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One is granted. Defendant's Motion to Compel Further Responses for Production Set Two and Set Three is granted, except for Request number 13 of Set Three. Request for Sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH FREEDMAN VS. JACQUELINE ANN EUBANKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Amended Form Interrogatories Amended Special Interrogatories Amended Requests For Production And Amended Requests For Admission And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF KEITH FREEDMAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Amended Form Interrogatories Amended Special Interrogatories Amended Requests For Production And Amended Requests For Admission And Request For Monetary Sanctions Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on March 13, 2017. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 301 no later than February 27, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of opposition and reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANNE "JASMYN" CHAUDHARY VS. FREEZESTORE FAYETTE STREET, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion Of To Compel Defense Medical Examination; Request For Sanctions

DEFENDANT FREEZESTORE FAYETTE STREET, LLC,, DEWOLF REALTY COMPANY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Defense Medical Examination; Request For Sanctions Hearing Required.
